findings.title: Docker verifier container runs as root with bridge networking, contradicting doc comment
findings.detail: buildDockerArgs() in src/agents/verifier/sandbox.ts passes --user root and --network bridge to every docker run invocation. The module-level docstring explicitly says 'no host network by default' but the implementation uses bridge (full outbound access), not none.
findings.fix_sketch: Change '--network', 'bridge' to '--network', 'none' in buildDockerArgs(). Add '--user', '1000' and '--cap-drop', 'ALL', '--no-new-privileges'. Run install phase with bridge separately, then set none for build/typecheck/lint/test phases.

findings.title: signLegacyPayload is an exported dead function with misleading argument order
findings.detail: src/queue/control-plane.ts exports signLegacyPayload(secret, timestamp, nonce, body) which inverts argument order vs signPayload({timestamp, nonce, body}, secret). No production callsite imports it, but its presence is a trap for future callers.
findings.fix_sketch: Remove the signLegacyPayload export entirely. No production importers exist.

findings.title: SprintManager.dispatch double-saves task using stale base object for running-state transition
findings.detail: dispatch() saves the task twice: once for 'assigned' state with attempts+1, then again for 'running' state spreading the original stale task object. Any fields written in the assigned-state save will be silently dropped by the running-state spread.
findings.fix_sketch: After the first saveTask (assigned state), reload: const assignedTask = this.store.loadTask(task.id) ?? task; then use assignedTask as the spread base for the running-state save.

findings.title: Codex adapter passes raw user brief as CLI argument without injection sanitization layer
findings.detail: buildCodexArgs() in src/workers/codex.ts appends opts.brief directly as a positional CLI argument with no DATA-block wrapping, unlike the Claude adapter which applies wrapBriefAsData(). No active injection vector since spawn uses shell:false, but there is no defense-in-depth layer.
findings.fix_sketch: Apply wrapBriefAsData() from claude-env.ts before passing the brief to the codex CLI, or validate the brief does not contain shell metacharacter sequences.

findings.title: Dead exported type guards isDiscordSource and isGitHubSource in src/contracts/task.ts
findings.detail: isDiscordSource and isGitHubSource are exported but have no production callsites. Inline kind checks (task.source.kind === 'discord') are used throughout instead.
findings.fix_sketch: Remove isDiscordSource and isGitHubSource. Update test-only usages to use inline kind checks.

findings.title: AUDIT_SEVERITIES constant in src/audit/types.ts exported but has no production importers
findings.detail: AUDIT_SEVERITIES is an exported array constant with no production importers per ts-prune. Creates a second source of truth that can drift from the AuditSeverity union type.
findings.fix_sketch: Remove the export or add a satisfies readonly AuditSeverity[] assertion to make the array load-bearing as a compile-time exhaustiveness check.
